title: Eric Jerome Dickey's Friends and Lovers Part I
original_title: Eric Jerome Dickey's Friends and Lovers Part I
overview: Four friends' lives become intertwined when romance blooms between a doctor and a comedian, while his best friend falls for her free-spirited bestie. After a tragic event, their relationships evolve into something deeper than friendship.
